name: VGPC
address: 6 Commerce St Suite C, Hot Springs Village, AR 71909
about: The Village Golf Performance Center (VGPC) is a state-of-the-art golf training and simulation facility located in Hot Springs Village, AR. It utilizes TrackMan technology to provide year-round golf practice, swing analysis, and play on world-class courses, regardless of weather conditions. The facility offers various amenities, including simulator bays with precise shot tracking, fitness center access for members, and a comprehensive resource library with data-driven guides to improve performance. It caters to both individual golfers looking to refine their skills and groups interested in competitive leagues or private events, providing a professional environment focused on technology-driven improvement and performance.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to professional-grade TrackMan technology for precise swing and ball analysis
Year-round indoor play on over 400 world-class golf courses
Comprehensive membership options including fitness center access and priority booking
Structured environment for leagues, competitions, and skill development
Data-driven insights and pro strategies through guides and resources

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site bar or alcohol services mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor offering real-time data insights
Advanced simulator technology with 3D courses and analytics

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own clubs to use the simulators effectively.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted, as no on-site dining facilities are available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes 2-3 hours depending on simulator availability and group size.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The facility does not specifically advertise kid-friendly amenities or features, so it's best suited for adults and older youth interested in golf training.
